PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-11-2017 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jun-20-2017 Continued To Jul-11-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar May-16-2017 Continued To Jun-20-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Milton Katz for Petitioner.

The Court stated that there are procedural issues and that the handwritten will is not self- proving. Mr. Katz apologized for his inexperience and attempting to streamline, stated that there is no opposition, that the Decedent's Daughter is not opposed and asked the Court to take his oversight into consideration. The Petition to Determine Succession to Real Property is continued to June 20, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Katz to file a proper amended petition with proper notice and for both Petitioners to sign and verify the Inventory and Appraisal.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar May-02-2017 Continued To May-16-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-18-2017 Continued To May-02-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-07-2017 Continued To Apr-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Milton Katz for petitioner Don Kim.

The Court noted that it is still waiting for petitioner to submit his response to the examiner's notes. Mr. Katz stated that he had contacted Isidoor Bornstein to obtain the probate referee's appraisal of estate assets, and has yet to receive the appraisal after over a month. He added that he was also waiting for a response from Fredom West for information on the procedures for a transfer of membership. He requested a continuance of the Status hearing for six weeks. The matter was continued to April 18, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)
